### Post by b52src on 2011-09-26
I am Having an Issue setting up My second Display
I am using Ubuntu 11.10 Beta 2 
Using the current Nvidia driver with 2 9800 GTX+ One card driving each display
i can get the second screen enabled in the Nvidia Driver utility 
however the second display just shows a white screen and if i move my mouse over to it it has a black "X" as the cursor

 Thanks in Advanced

Here is My xorg file
